testcase.name: Create new system

failure.message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : Sistema com esse título já existe} (Session info: chrome=143.0.7499.193): Sistema com esse título já existe Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [6f98f5052286b1930158f759b1f9f5d7, findElements {using=css selector, value=.list-item}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 143.0.7499.193, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 143.0.7499.192 (be2c1f4fd45..., userDataDir: C:\Users\GABRIE~1.FAL\AppDa...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:58118}, goog:processID: 26556, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:58118/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 143.0.7499.193, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 6f98f5052286b1930158f759b1f9f5d7

testcase.system-out: Given I am on the home page.................................................passed When I navigate to the settings page........................................passed And I click on the "Systems" tab............................................passed And I fill in the system field with "Automated Test System".................passed And I click the "Add" button................................................passed Then the system "Automated Test System" should appear in the list...........failed
